workflow_plan.purpose: Build the paper/source foundation, runtime state, canvas defaults, framework-figure readiness state, optional author-supplement request, and risk register.
Prepare reader question, figure role, narrative structure, visual directions, sketch candidate cards, and all S2 prompt packages/prompt-index before S2 image generation.

Generate first-round publication-style framework candidates from S1-prepared prompt packages unless an explicit compatible style override is recorded. Do not write text review, aggregate, or next-step prose.
Review S2 sketches with issue-ledger and exploration aggregate duties, then select the paper-grounded refinement direction.
Prepare the formal candidate matrix and all S5 prompt packages/prompt-index before formal candidate image generation.
Generate formal paper-framework raster candidates from S4-prepared prompt packages. This is the terminal assistant workflow stage; remaining decisions are human decisions.

terminal_message: 我的任务已经完成，剩下由人类来决策。
path_storage_policy: all stored paths are project-run relative; host-specific absolute paths are not persisted

v3215_terminal_candidate_workflow.rule: S2 and S5 are image-generation-only public stages. S1 prepares S2 prompt packages, S3 reviews and aggregates S2 outputs, S4 prepares S5 prompt packages, and assistant workflow ends after S5 image generation.
removed_units: S3 aggregate over S2 outputs substage

v3215_candidate_id_coherence_policy.rule: candidate_id must match prompt_path, target_image_path, candidate_run_registry keys, substage candidate_ids, artifact candidate_id fields, active image paths, and checkpoint image inventories. Do not renumber or reinterpret IDs by stage defaults after a prompt-index exists.
v3215_candidate_id_coherence_policy.s2_default_id_family: C01-C08 unless a validated prompt-index defines equivalent stage candidates
v3215_candidate_id_coherence_policy.s5_default_id_family: F01-F06 unless a validated prompt-index defines project-specific formal candidate IDs
v3215_candidate_id_coherence_policy.human_prompt_rule: Suggested prompts should say '请使用 paper-framework-figure-studio-pro skill' and should not mention zip package names or versioned skill zip files.

target_raster_image_generation_policy.rule: Target-paper sketches and formal candidates must be raster images produced by the runtime-locked image-generation route. SVG/HTML/Mermaid/canvas/PPT/PDF/code-drawn or programmatic-raster substitutes are invalid for target images even when saved as PNG/JPG/WebP.
target_raster_image_generation_policy.no_fallback_substitute: If the required route is unavailable, stop and report the limitation instead of fabricating SVG, code-drawn, Python/PIL/Matplotlib/Graphviz/TikZ/Mermaid, canvas screenshot, SVG-to-PNG, PPT/PDF-rendered, or other local raster placeholders.
target_raster_image_generation_policy.codex_route_requirement: In Codex, every S2/S5 target-paper image unit must call image_gen.
target_raster_image_generation_policy.chatgpt_web_route_requirement: In ChatGPT web, every S2/S5 target-paper image unit must use Create Image / ChatGPT Images 2.0.
target_raster_image_generation_policy.approved_api_requirement: A named approved image-generation API is allowed only in runtimes where neither Codex image_gen nor ChatGPT web Create Image is available.
target_raster_image_generation_policy.registration_provenance_requirement: register-image-batch and target-image artifact registration must cite a recorded image_generation_event from the environment-locked route.
target_raster_image_generation_policy.direct_delete_policy: Direct artifact delete is forbidden for active target-paper image artifacts. Mark stale, reset candidate, or use rewind-step cleanup for explicit upstream reruns; preserve provenance records.

paper_framework_non_poster_policy: This skill is only for research-paper framework/architecture/pipeline/mechanism figures. It must not produce posters, marketing visuals, cover art, decorative exhibition boards, or PPT-slide content pages.

default_canvas_policy.state_recording_policy: If the user changes the aspect ratio, record the requested ratio in project state and carry it through later image prompts.

default_density_policy: Default figure density is readable and not crowded. S1/S4 prompt preparation must cap repeated dots, samples, rows, entities, legends, distributions, and context panels before generation. Use the image as a cognitive map; move definitions, caveats, dense equations, symbol meanings, and long explanations to surrounding manuscript text handled outside the assistant work after S5.

fixed_candidate_contract_policy.rule: S2/S5 have no standalone heavy per-image text review or candidate-level revision substages. S1/S4 must still prepare strict paper-grounded prompt contracts, and S3 must review S2 images before direction selection.

entity_compression_and_navigation_guard_.entity_rule: Repeated entity families default to compact markers around one canonical process unless source evidence justifies distinct branches or explicit comparison.
entity_compression_and_navigation_guard_.navigation_rule: Next-step guidance resolves navigation_state from conversation execution and image-generation events before checkpoint restore_state.

substage_orchestration_policy.text_image_separation_rule: S2 and S5 only generate images. S1/S4 own prompt preparation; S3 reviews and aggregates S2 outputs; no S5 assistant-side review exists.
substage_orchestration_policy.image_route_guard: S2/S5 IMAGE_GENERATE must use Codex image_gen, ChatGPT web Create Image / ChatGPT Images 2.0, or a named approved image-generation API only in other runtimes.
substage_orchestration_policy.default_required_sequence: S1 prepares S2 prompts -> S2 generates images -> S3 reviews/aggregates S2 and selects direction -> S4 prepares S5 prompts -> S5 generates images -> END.
substage_orchestration_policy.s2_review_to_s4_transfer_rule: S3 records review findings from S2 outputs; S4 transfers useful findings into S5 prompt constraints.
substage_orchestration_policy.s5_terminal_rule: After S5 image generation, assistant workflow ends. No next prompt is offered.

workflow_boundary_policy.terminal_reply: 我的任务已经完成，剩下由人类来决策。
workflow_boundary_policy.s1_to_s2_rule: S1 prepares S2 prompts and stops; S2 image generation requires a new explicit user turn.
workflow_boundary_policy.s4_to_s5_rule: S4 prepares S5 prompts and stops; S5 image generation requires a new explicit user turn.

style_transfer_policy.style_preference_scope_policy: Preference references inform S1 figure-type/reader-effect suggestions and do not automatically force S2/S5 style.
style_transfer_policy.candidate_mix_policy: S2 defaults to 8 formal publication-style first-round candidates; S5 defaults to 6 formal candidates for complete-framework tasks unless the project state overrides this.

first_round_style_options.meaning: Default. Clean publication-style academic framework schematic for first-round comparison; polished surface, but still one candidate direction.
Rough exploratory framework sketch, whiteboard/wireframe feel, sparse labels.
Very rough boxes, arrows, grouping, and layout structure with minimal surface polish.
Cleaner line-art while still exploratory; no excessive final polish.

first_round_style_options.label_zh: 正式 schematic 布局草案
first_round_style_options.meaning: More ordered schematic grammar for layout testing.
Grid/port/routing emphasis for high arrow-risk papers; avoid dense blueprint clutter.
Light scientific editorial treatment with separable modules and restrained texture.
UI/control-board metaphor only when it clarifies paper mechanisms without adding facts.
Mild dimensional structure only when it does not obscure connectors or labels.
Compact explanation board, with density and caption burden explicitly budgeted.
Narrative/storyboard option only when S1 records a close story-to-paper bridge.

first_round_style_options.label_zh: ACM/IEEE/AAAI 双栏论文 line-art schematic
first_round_style_options.meaning: Optional first-round publication-line-art surface. Use only when explicitly requested in the S1 user request before S1 finalizes S2 prompt packages.

style_transfer_policy.first_round_style_user_reminder: 非复制表面风格提示：第一轮 S2 默认表面风格为正式出版风格；这只约束渲染表面，不等同于候选图的叙事、布局或处理方案。若要修改，请在下一轮 S1 请求中另行明确写入表面风格选择或取消默认表面风格；请不要把本说明复制进默认提示词块。可写例如“第一轮采用 ACM/IEEE/AAAI 双栏论文 line-art schematic 表面风格”，也可以写“取消默认表面风格，请 S1 根据论文实际需要自行设置表面风格”。可选表面风格包括：正式出版风格、低保真草图、白板线框、干净扁平极简线稿、正式 schematic 布局草案、轻量蓝图精密稿、轻量科学插画、轻量界面隐喻、轻量等距结构、轻量信息图板、手绘故事板、ACM/IEEE/AAAI 双栏论文 line-art schematic。
style_transfer_policy.first_round_style_stage_reminder_policy: S0 must include a compact non-blocking surface-style reminder outside the copyable S1 prompt block; S1 records any explicit surface-style override or default-surface cancellation from the S1 user request; S1-to-S2 must repeat the available first-round surface-style menu as non-copyable prose outside the copyable S2 prompt and must explain that changing the first-round surface after S1 requires rerunning S1 before S2; S2 is image-only and follows the prompt-index.
style_transfer_policy.surface_style_dimension_policy: A surface style is only the rendering layer. Even when explicitly set, it must be combined with narrative role, layout grammar, semantic emphasis, density budget, connector hierarchy, and paper-source constraints; it must not be treated as the full candidate style.

second_round_optional_style_options.meaning: Default formal publication schematic surface for S5 candidates.
Clean flat line-art surface for formal candidates with minimal ornament.
Light blueprint/grid/port/routing treatment for arrow-risk formal candidates.
Restrained scientific editorial treatment while preserving modular semantics.
Light UI/control-board metaphor only when it clarifies the paper mechanism.
Mild dimensional structure only when connectors and labels remain clear.
Compact explanatory board with explicit density and caption-burden control.

second_round_optional_style_options.label_zh: ACM/IEEE/AAAI 双栏论文 line-art schematic
second_round_optional_style_options.meaning: Optional publication-line-art surface; inject the dedicated ACM/IEEE/AAAI style block when active.

style_transfer_policy.second_round_style_user_reminder: 可选第二轮表面风格：S5 正式候选默认由 S4 根据论文需要设置表面风格；表面风格只约束渲染层，不改变候选图的论文语义、布局骨架、连线证据和密度预算。若希望指定第二轮表面风格，请在下一轮 S4 请求中另行写入“第二轮采用 <表面风格名> 表面风格”。可选项包括：正式出版风格、干净扁平极简线稿、轻量蓝图精密稿、轻量科学插画、轻量界面隐喻、轻量等距结构、轻量信息图板、ACM/IEEE/AAAI 双栏论文 line-art schematic。也可以写“取消默认表面风格，请 S4 根据论文实际需要自行设置 S5 表面风格”。低保真草图、白板线框、手绘故事板默认只适合第一轮探索；若要用于第二轮，必须在 S4 请求中明确说明它仍需保持 formal candidate 可读性。
style_transfer_policy.s1_to_s2_style_options_reminder: 非复制表面风格提示：第一轮 S2 默认表面风格为正式出版风格，除非 S1 已在 prompt-index 中记录了显式覆盖或取消默认表面风格；S2 只会按该记录生成图片。若想在运行 S2 前修改第一轮表面风格，需要回到 S1 重做 prompt packages，而不是改 S2 生图提示词。可选表面风格包括：正式出版风格、低保真草图、白板线框、干净扁平极简线稿、正式 schematic 布局草案、轻量蓝图精密稿、轻量科学插画、轻量界面隐喻、轻量等距结构、轻量信息图板、手绘故事板、ACM/IEEE/AAAI 双栏论文 line-art schematic。可在重新执行 S1 时另行写入例如“第一轮采用 轻量蓝图精密稿 表面风格”或“取消默认表面风格，请 S1 根据论文实际需要自行设置表面风格”。

atlas_display_policy.policy: Whenever a reply mentions subtype/category atlas boards, layout grammar, visual communication styles, reader-role detail, or subtype overview, embed the corresponding saved PNG board with Markdown. Do not build generated web pages in any environment, including Codex.

runtime_environment.note: set-runtime-config should record chatgpt_web/codex/other before image generation

chatgpt_web_text_only_guard: 本轮纯文字：只执行文字、state、manifest、brief、audit、guidance 或 checkpoint 写入；不要生成任何图片。
required_terminal_answer_after_s5: 我的任务已经完成，剩下由人类来决策。

strict_source_grounded_modular_prompt_co.rule: Every S1/S4 image prompt must include strict source-grounded connector evidence, connector multiplicity/bundling, edge-label-first variable placement, modular-not-fragmented structure, simple reviewer-recognizable internal motifs, no duplicate workflow/inset, and small background context. If blockers remain after three audit/repair cycles, stop before image handoff and write residual risk.
